EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to create a crontab file for the user {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change the crontab file of the user {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted the crontab file of the user {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete the crontab file of the user {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created a crontab file for the user {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the crontab file of the user {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
